headline: Garlic scapes due on w3 — check by Friday
weather_notes: Irrigate all beds by Wednesday — last watered May 15–16 and no rain forecast before Thursday's slight 23% chance.
Install c1 bean trellis by Wednesday — clear dry conditions today through Wednesday close before a slight Thursday storm chance.

surfaced_tasks.title: Check w3 Italian Red for garlic scapes
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due Friday (May 22) at peak scape season for hardneck garlic in Zone 7b — remove scapes now to redirect energy to bulb development ahead of the July harvest.

suggested_tasks.title: Set up trellis support for c1 beans
suggested_tasks.description: Good Mother Stollard is a pole bean — seedlings sprouted May 13 and will need support within days before vines become too long to redirect cleanly.
